failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch result. It treated the two returned prices, 272.33 and 237.48, as below the minimum price 233.90, even though both are above it, and therefore produced an incorrect answer.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to answer which available Mechanical Keyboard items with RGB backlight cost more than $233.90. The required evidence was available at index 3: ProductCatalogSearch returned two matching available RGB mechanical keyboards priced 272.33 and 237.48, both greater than 233.90. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite conclusion, saying no items match. This directly contradicts the tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator reinforced the same incorrect interpretation.
